title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

As a Support Worker, you will assist residents with daily living activities, ensuring their comfort, dignity and independence. You will provide personal care, support mobility, and engage residents in meaningful activities.

You will work as part of a care team delivering high-quality support in a residential setting.
summary: Care home support role assisting residents with daily activities and wellbeing in Leeds.

title: Behaviour Support Worker
description:
Behaviour Support Worker

Supporting students with behavioural and emotional needs in a school environment. You will work closely with teaching staff to manage behaviour and support learning outcomes.

Experience with SEMH is beneficial.
summary: School-based role supporting pupils with behavioural needs and classroom engagement in Leeds.

title: Autism Support Worker
description:
Autism Support Worker

Working with pupils with autism and additional needs. You will support learning, communication and social development within a specialist setting.

Previous SEN experience is desirable.
summary: Specialist support role helping pupils with autism develop learning and communication skills.

title: Residential Support Worker
description:
Residential Support Worker

Supporting children and young people in a residential care setting. You will assist with daily routines, emotional support and safeguarding.

You will contribute to care planning and provide a safe, structured environment.
summary: Residential care role supporting young people with routines, safety and development in Leeds.

title: Care Support Worker
description:
Care Support Worker

Providing care to individuals in their own homes. Duties include personal care, medication support and assisting with daily activities.

A compassionate approach and reliability are essential.
summary: Home care role supporting individuals with daily living and personal care in Leeds.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Providing support in a residential or supported living environment. Responsibilities include personal care, promoting independence and supporting daily routines.

Previous care experience preferred.
summary: General support role assisting individuals with independence and daily routines in Bradford.

title: Complex Care Support Worker
description:
Complex Care Support Worker

Supporting individuals with complex medical needs in their homes. Duties include personal care, medication support and monitoring health conditions.

Experience in complex care is required.
summary: Home-based role supporting clients with complex medical needs in Huddersfield.

title: Behaviour Support Worker
description:
Behaviour Support Worker

Supporting pupils with behavioural challenges in a classroom setting. You will assist with behaviour management and support engagement with learning.

Relevant experience is advantageous.
summary: Education role supporting students with behavioural needs in Wakefield schools.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Working within a healthcare setting supporting individuals with mental health needs. Responsibilities include assisting with daily routines, providing emotional support and promoting recovery.

Training provided.
summary: Healthcare support role assisting individuals with mental health needs in Halifax.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Providing support to individuals with learning disabilities. Duties include personal care, community engagement and promoting independence.

You will work as part of a supportive team environment.
summary: Community support role helping individuals with learning disabilities live independently in Keighley.
